name: Werewolf! Bigby Wolf
description:
You accidentally go into Bigby's apartment on the wrong day.

Bigby monster fucker simulator that i wrote at 2am 🫶

Had werewolves on the brain recently, ugh prepare to get a bunch of werewolf bots.

ALSO! Classes this semester have been kicking my ass, plus my job steals all my free time waaaaa I'm gonna finish the bots sitting in my drafts then start on my requests! Bots will probably just be released a bit slower than normal, I'll still be working on them!!
